e , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class StringReplace extends TypedAtomicActor On each firing, look for instances of the pattern specified by pattern in stringToEdit and replace them with the

pattern in stringToEdit and replace them with the string given by replacement . If replaceAll is true, then replace all instances that match pattern . Otherwise, replace only the first instance that matches. If there is no match, then the

e that matches. If there is no match, then the output is the string provided by stringToEdit , unchanged. The pattern is given by a regular expression. For a reference on regular expression syntax see: http://java.sun.com/docs/books/tutoria
